title: The Journey
body: From a hand-cranked press to a name people trust - here's how our story unfolded.

pages.title: Where It All Started
pages.image_alt: A traditional sugarcane field at sunrise
pages.body: It began with a small hand-cranked press and a simple belief: nothing beats the taste of sugarcane pressed fresh in front of you. No shortcuts, no additives - just the fruit of the field.

facts.text: One small cart, one busy corner

pages.title: Growing Roots
pages.image_alt: Fields that supplied the first outlet
pages.body: Word spread, and the cart became a proper outlet. We built direct relationships with local farmers to make sure every glass stayed true to the original recipe - fresh, natural, and honest.

pages.title: A Growing Family
pages.image_alt: Fresh ingredients used across our outlets
pages.body: New outlets opened across the city, each one trained on the same simple process. New flavours joined the menu, but the core promise never changed: pressed fresh, served with care.

facts.text: Became a family tradition for our regulars

pages.title: Bringing It To You
pages.image_alt: Friends enjoying fresh sugarcane juice together
pages.body: Today we serve everyday customers, weddings, festivals and franchise partners - all with the same glass we started with. Thank you for being part of the story.

facts.text: Now available for events across the country
